title: MedievalCreate
description: Vanilla + Create modpack with medieval mods
body:
This modpack includes a variety of medieval-themed mods along with the Create mod. It's designed for multiplayer gameplay with friends, perfect for medieval roleplay with factions, trade, warfare, and more.

###  Realistic Seasons
- Experience seasonal changes that affect your farming and body temperature:
  
- Spring & Fall: Best time to plant carrots and potatoes and perfect temperature
  
- Summer: Ideal for wheat and onions but really warm
  
- Winter: Perfect to grow cabbage but really cold
  
- Manage your food supply wisely, your army and your workers will need the food

###  Automation with Create & Workers

- The Create mod lets you automate almost anything, from complex machinery to food production. The Workers mod adds some NPCs who can harvest crops and run a animal farm.

- With the Create v0.6 update, you can now build powerful industries and trade your products with other players.


###  Key Features
- Recruits & Workers to assist you
  
- Siege machines and ships for epic battles
  
- Seasonal changes that influence crop growth and body temperature
  
- A more realistic world with natural limitations
  
- Many new crops and food types

- Thirst and the ability to clean water
  
- Create mod machines and Create Additions content
  
- Medieval armor, shields, and weapons
  
- Realstic fluid physics
  
- Muskets and a variety of other weapons
  
- Factions system and proximity voice chat
  
- Many performance enhancing mods
  
- Visual enhancements for a better looking game

###  Essential Client Mods

- Minimap

- JEI/EMI

- Jade

- Lighty
